name: customerly
description: Reads Customerly users, leads, and accounts, and writes user/lead/tag/message/attribute/company mutations through the Customerly v1 REST API.

risk.read: external Customerly API read of user, lead, and account contact data
risk.write: external mutation of live Customerly users/leads/tags/messages/attributes/companies, including irreversible user and lead deletion; approval required
